title: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.2.52-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.52
- Support interface alternative names. RHEL-110777
- Support IPv4 forwarding. RHEL-110786
- Support IPSec leftsendcert option. RHEL-110633

[2.2.50-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.50
- Support MAC referring for VLAN in nmstatectl gc. RHEL-110368
full_text:
[2.2.52-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.52
- Support interface alternative names. RHEL-110777
- Support IPv4 forwarding. RHEL-110786
- Support IPSec leftsendcert option. RHEL-110633

[2.2.50-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.50
- Support MAC referring for VLAN in nmstatectl gc. RHEL-110368

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-18065.html
